fields.name: sourceID
fields.description: UID (unique over entire WSA via programme ID prefix) of this merged detection as assigned by merge algorithm

fields.name: frameSetID
fields.description: UID of the set of frames that this merged source comes from

fields.name: ra
fields.description: Celestial Right Ascension

fields.name: dec
fields.description: Celestial Declination

fields.name: l
fields.description: Galactic longitude

fields.name: b
fields.description: Galactic latitude

fields.name: priOrSec
fields.description: Seam code for a unique (=0) or duplicated (!=0) source (e.g. flags overlap duplicates)

fields.name: ymj_1Pnt
fields.description: Point source colour Y-J_1 (using aperMag3)

fields.name: jmhPnt
fields.description: Point source colour J-H (using aperMag3)

fields.name: hmkPnt
fields.description: Point source colour H-K (using aperMag3)

fields.name: mergedClassStat
fields.description: Merged N(0,1) stellarness-of-profile statistic

fields.name: mergedClass
fields.description: Class flag from available measurements: 1=galaxy, 0=noise, -1=stellar, -2=probableStar, -3=probableGalaxy, -9=saturated

fields.name: pStar
fields.description: Probability that the source is a star

fields.name: pGalaxy
fields.description: Probability that the source is a galaxy

fields.name: pNoise
fields.description: Probability that the source is noise

fields.name: pSaturated
fields.description: Probability that the source is saturated

fields.name: eBV
fields.description: Galactic dust extinction value measured from the Schlegel, Finkbeiner & Davis (1998) maps, with the correction given in Bonifacio, Monai & Beers (2000)

fields.name: aY
fields.description: Galactic extinction correction in the Y band for extragalactic objects

fields.name: aJ
fields.description: Galactic extinction correction in the J band for extragalactic objects

fields.name: aH
fields.description: Galactic extinction correction in the H band for extragalactic objects

fields.name: aK
fields.description: Galactic extinction correction in the K band for extragalactic objects

fields.name: yAperMag3
fields.description: Default point source Y aperture corrected mag (2.0 arcsec aperture diameter)

fields.name: yAperMag3Err
fields.description: Error in default point source Y mag (2.0 arcsec aperture diameter)

fields.name: yPetroMag
fields.description: Extended source Y mag (Petrosian)

fields.name: yClass
fields.description: Discrete image classification flag in Y

fields.name: j_1AperMag3
fields.description: Default point source J_1 aperture corrected mag (2.0 arcsec aperture diameter)

fields.name: j_1AperMag3Err
fields.description: Error in default point source J_1 mag (2.0 arcsec aperture diameter)

fields.name: j_1Class
fields.description: Discrete image classification flag in J_1

fields.name: jAperMag3
fields.description: Default point source J aperture corrected mag (2.0 arcsec aperture diameter); J is the DR11 two-epoch deep band

fields.name: hAperMag3
fields.description: Default point source H aperture corrected mag (2.0 arcsec aperture diameter)

fields.name: hAperMag3Err
fields.description: Error in default point source H mag (2.0 arcsec aperture diameter)

fields.name: hClass
fields.description: Discrete image classification flag in H

fields.name: kAperMag3
fields.description: Default point source K aperture corrected mag (2.0 arcsec aperture diameter)

fields.name: kAperMag3Err
fields.description: Error in default point source K mag (2.0 arcsec aperture diameter)

fields.name: kClass
fields.description: Discrete image classification flag in K
